zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda Strathearn於1245年之前出生在英國蘇格蘭時，她的父親Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn69歲，母親Matilda de Moravia66歲。她與Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1330年在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾克勞福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda Strathearn于1245年之前出生在英国苏格兰时，她的父亲Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn69岁，母亲Matilda de Moravia66岁。她与Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1330年在英国苏格兰藍納可爾克勞福德。

nameMeanings.name: Strathearn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Strathearn in Perthshire. The placename means ‘the valley of the river Earn’, from Gaelic srath ‘valley’ + the river name Earn.

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda Strathearn was born before 1245, in Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn, was 69 and her mother, Matilda de Moravia, was 66. She married Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1330, in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda Strathearn est née avant 1245, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn, avait 69 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Moravia, avait 66 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1330, à Crawford, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda Strathearn vor 1245 in Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn 69 und ihre Mutter Matilda de Moravia 66. Sie hat Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1330 in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Strathearn è nata il prima del 1245 nel Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn, aveva 69 anni e sua madre, Matilda de Moravia, aveva 66 anni. Lei sposato Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1330, nel Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda Strathearnが1245年以前にイギリススコットランドで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearnは69歳，母Matilda de Moraviaは66歳であった。Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1330年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアクラウフォードで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Strathearn(이)가 1245년 이전 영국 스코틀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn(은)는 69세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda de Moravia(은)는 66세였다. 그녀는 Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1330년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 크롤퍼드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Strathearn nasceu antes 1245, em Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn, tinha 69 anos e sua mãe, Matilda de Moravia, tinha 66 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1330, em Crawford, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda Strathearn родилась перед 1245 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn было 69 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Moravia, 66. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1330 г. в местности кравфорд, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matilda Strathearn nació antes de 1245, en Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn, tenía 69 años y su mamá, Matilda de Moravia, tenía 66 años. Se casó con Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1330, en Crawford, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
